{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"5","subject":"Implement display + config/shell/hook/access command stubs + flag expansion","description":"In an isolated worktree, implement all stubbed display, config, shell, hook, and access commands and expand flags on existing ones in src/cmd/cmd.zig.

STUBBED COMMANDS TO IMPLEMENT:
- choose-client: interactive client chooser, parse -N/-r/-Z/-F/-f/-K/-O/-t, template
- confirm-before: confirmation prompt, parse -b/-y/-c/-p/-t, command
- customize-mode: options customization tree UI, parse -N/-Z/-F/-f/-t
- display-menu: popup menu, parse -O/-M/-b/-c/-C/-H/-s/-S/-t/-T/-x/-y, name/key/command triples
- display-popup: popup window, parse -B/-C/-E/-k/-N/-b/-c/-d/-e/-h/-s/-S/-t/-T/-w/-x/-y, shell-command
- set-hook: set/unset hooks, parse -a/-g/-p/-R/-u/-w/-t, hook name + command
- show-hooks: display hooks, parse -g/-p/-w/-t, hook name filter
- clear-prompt-history: clear prompt history, parse -T
- show-prompt-history: show prompt history, parse -T
- wait-for: event signaling, parse -L/-S/-U, channel name
- server-access: manage server ACL, parse -a/-d/-l/-r/-w/-t, user

FLAG EXPANSION ON EXISTING:
- clock-mode: add -t
- display-message: add -a/-C/-I/-l/-N/-p/-v/-c/-d/-F/-t
- command-prompt: add -1/-b/-e/-F/-i/-k/-l/-N/-I/-p/-t/-T, template
- copy-mode: add -d/-e/-H/-M/-q/-S/-u/-s/-t
- source-file: add -F/-n/-q/-v/-t, glob support
- if-shell: add -b/-F
- run-shell: add -b/-C/-E/-c/-d/-t
- set-option: add -a/-F/-o/-p/-q/-s/-u/-U/-w, expand recognized options
- show-options: add -A/-g/-H/-p/-q/-s/-v/-w
- set-environment: implement fully, parse -F/-h/-g/-r/-u/-t
- show-environment: implement fully, parse -h/-g/-s/-t

Also create src/cmd/display_commands_test.zig, src/cmd/option_commands_test.zig, and src/cmd/config_shell_test.zig.

Reference: tmux(1) 3.5a man page.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-04-03T21:08:24.199Z"}
</teammate-message>
